components.name: Surface
components.description: L1 card — main content container (bg-surface-1, rounded-2xl)

components.name: Group
components.description: L2 nested group — rows inside a Surface (bg-surface-2, divide-y, rounded-xl)

components.name: Row
components.description: Key-value row inside a Group (min-h-[44px])

components.name: TapRow
components.description: Tappable row with chevron — navigates somewhere (min-h-[44px])

components.name: SectionHeader
components.description: Tiny uppercase section label (text-xs, tracking-wider, text-text-secondary)

components.name: ActionButton
components.description: Primary green CTA button (bg-success, h-14, rounded-2xl, full width)

components.name: GhostButton
components.description: Ghost/outlined secondary button (border-border, h-12, rounded-2xl, full width)

components.name: Alert
components.description: Inline alert banner with variant colors (rounded-2xl, border)

components.name: Stat
components.description: Compact stat box — monospace value with tiny label (e.g. volume, trucks, workers)
